# sweb_subdomain (Resource)

Manages a subdomain of a domain on the account (createSubdomain/removeSubdomain on /domains). The parent domain must already belong to the account. Destroying the resource removes the subdomain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a subdomain of a domain the account already owns.
# Destroying the resource removes the subdomain.
resource "sweb_subdomain" "shop" {
  domain  = "example.com"
  machine = "shop" # -> shop.example.com ("*" for a wildcard)
  dir     = "/shop" # optional site directory
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The parent domain (must already be on the account).
- `machine` (String) The subdomain label (e.g. "shop" for shop.example.com, or "*" for a wildcard).

### Optional

- `dir` (String) Site directory for the subdomain. Set at creation only; its drift is not tracked (the API reports an absolute docroot, not the value sent here).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource id ("<domain>/<machine>").
